title: SDK Spec Support Matrix
description: Per-(SDK, spec) high-level support classification, produced by genspecs judge.

model.description: Model identifier used by the judge, e.g. 'claude-opus-4-5' or 'none'.

prompt_version.description: Versioned prompt id so cached results from older prompts can be invalidated.

sdks.description: Map of sdk id to a map of spec id to support cell.

Cell.description: Per-cell support classification. Intentionally slim: state + confidence + a short rationale + optional human-readable notes. Auditing metadata (source provenance, evidence list, judged-at timestamps, judged-against commit hashes, judge model) is preserved in the on-disk judge cache at tool/specs/.judge-cache/, not in this product.
